_policy.seen_count_semantics: informational, monotonic — counts how many polling runs observed this draft un-actioned
_policy.action_trigger: manual — boss decision to merge PR#1 (publish /news page) or close (archive). Unbounded growth during dead window 2026-06-22 to 2026-07-15 is expected and not a signal of drift.
_policy.auto_suppress: CRITICAL alerts suppressed by dead-window guard (run#33+). Stale-draft seen_count increments silently during dead window.

_run_label_index.semantics: Maps named run labels to the seen_count committed at end of that run. seen_count ≠ run number — the counter is a monotonic polling-cycle count; run labels are session names assigned separately.

corrections.run#45_report_error: Step 1 log stated 'seen_count incremented 45→47 (2 new cycles since run#44)'. Actual: run#44 committed seen_count=45; run#45 committed seen_count=46 — 1 new cycle, not 2. The '→47' figure was a report artifact. JSON ground truth is authoritative over prose logs. RESOLVED: run#46 (interstitial automated poll at 2026-06-22T08:31:10Z) committed seen_count=47 — the '→47' figure was not a report artifact, it reflected real post-run#45 state that had not yet been labeled.

announcement-spiritvale-official-date-re.triage_note: EXPECTED NOISE — dead window (2026-06-22 to 2026-07-15). This is an announcement-type draft (not a patch), covering Demo Jun 12 (already launched) + EA Jul 15 (upcoming). CRITICAL re-escalation fired run#32; further CRITICAL alerts suppressed by dead-window guard added run#33. Boss action pending: merge PR#1 (publish /news page) or close (archive). No code action needed until EA launch.

seen_count_log.note: run#33 — CRITICAL hyper-stale alert fired; hyper_alerted_at backfilled (code bug: return False prevented persistence)
